# Mogzy

> Mogzy (https://mogzy.lol) is a League of Legends knowledge platform: quizzes, a
> Daily Challenge, the Combat Lab damage simulator, League Docs reference pages,
> and pro-play data exploration. Mogzy is an unofficial fan project and isn't
> endorsed by Riot Games.

## Pages

- [League Hub](/lol): Main hub linking every League of Legends feature.
- [Quiz](/quiz): League of Legends quiz with categories, difficulty progression, and a Daily Challenge. Playable as a guest.
- [Combat Lab](/combat-lab): Damage and combat simulator — model champion loadouts, item builds, and duels.
- [League Docs](/lol/docs): Champion reference — base stats, growth curves, and abilities, with patch/source provenance.
- [Champion Index](/lol/docs/champions): Browse every documented champion.
- [Pro Data](/lol/docs/pro): Pro-play picks, bans, and presence by year, with scope and data-quality notes.
- [Tier List](/lol/tier-list): Curated champion tier list with methodology and FAQ.
- [Blog](/blog): Articles and rankings.

## Policies

- [About](/about)
- [Privacy](/privacy)
- [Terms](/terms)
- [Security](/security)
- [Contact](/contact)

## Notes

- Legacy routes from the earlier general "Mogsy" ranking product (/home, /play,
  /swipe, /shop, and similar) redirect to /lol while the site runs in
  League-only mode.
